payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular standard bed pillow with horizontal blue-gray and off-white thin stripes on a cotton-like fabric case; slightly wrinkled surface and partially edge-cropped on the left and right sides, appearing approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
